title: knautia integrifolia f. lyrata
intro: Knautia integrifolia f. lyrata, also known as the lyrate knawia or lyrate knautia, is a flowering plant species within the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been employed to treat various health conditions. The leaves and roots of Knautia integrifolia f. lyrata are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Knautia integrifolia f. lyrate can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are believed to offer health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune system function.
